body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Mechanicality** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Habit — automaticity, habitual behavior, action monitoring, loss of conscious control.
**Phase context:** habit, automaticity, habitual behavior, action monitoring, chunked behavior

Paper: Reading Covered Faces.
DOI: 10.1093/cercor/bhab311
Abstract: Covering faces with masks, due to mandatory pandemic safety regulations, we can no longer rely on the habitual daily-life information. This may be thought-provoking for healthy people, but particularly challenging for individuals with neuropsychiatric and neurodevelopmental conditions.
